name: Chocolate Mint Sticks
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease a 9-inch square baking pan. Beat the eggs. Add the melted butter and sugar. Beat well. Add the melted chocolate and peppermint extract. Beat until well combined. Add flour and ground almonds. Mix thoroughly. Pour into prepared pan.
2. Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean. Remove from oven and let cool on a trivet or rack.
3. Prepare the filling: In a small bowl, blend together butter and cream. Add confectioners' sugar (sifted) and peppermint extract. Mix well. Spread evenly over the cooled baked layer.
4. Prepare the frosting by melting chocolate and butter together in a small pan over low heat.
5. When the filling is completely firm, spread the frosting mixture on top. Refrigerate until the chocolate is firm. Cut into 3/4-inch by 2-1/4-inch strips.
from: Cookiemania
